ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patent_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent application */,
  "file_number" TEXT /* File number or ID of the patent application */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date the application was filed */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or category of the patent application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent application */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  "inventor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department handling the application */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent application */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the patent application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of patent application (e.g., utility, design, plant) */,
  "priority_date" TEXT /* Date of the earliest filing that the application claims priority to */,
  "status_changes" TEXT /* JSON field to store the history of status changes */,
  "current_department" INTEGER /* Current department handling the application */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the application status */,
  "filing_fee" TEXT /* Filing fee paid for the application */,
  "maintenance_fees" TEXT /* JSON field to store details of maintenance fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_applications_inventor_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventor_id") REFERENCES inventors ("inventor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_applications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventors" (
  "inventor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventor */,
  "inventor_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventor */,
  "inventor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the inventor */,
  "inventor_address" TEXT /* Address of the inventor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patent application */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the application */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_changes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES patent_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., examiner, legal, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_department_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patent application */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the application was assigned to the department */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the application to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_department_mapping_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES patent_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_department_mapping_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
